commands.review_summary:
The branch canonicalizes Slack approval user IDs to uppercase U/W IDs and adds regression coverage for exec approval, plugin approval, and Slack interaction paths.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main returns lowercase for `normalizeSlackApproverId("u123")` but uppercase for `"U123"`, and the auth helpers compare exact strings. I did not run tests because this review is read-only and local test commands can create artifacts.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because the PR has a protected maintainer label and lacks real Slack behavior proof; there is no narrow code repair finding for ClawSweeper to fix.

target.title: fix(slack): normalize approval user ids
target.body:
## Summary

- Normalize Slack approver ids through one user-id parser before exec and plugin approval authorization.
- Preserve rejection for channel-like ids while accepting lowercase raw, `user:`, `slack:`, and mention forms.
- Add regression coverage for configured-id casing and sender-id casing in exec approvals, plugin approvals, and Slack interaction entrypoints.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/slack/src/exec-approvals.test.ts extensions/slack/src/approval-auth.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/slack/src/monitor/events/interactions.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/commands-approve.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Slack approvals denied when configured approver ids used lowercase Slack user ids while Slack events delivered uppercase user ids.
Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw Codex worktree on Node/Vitest with Slack channel approval and interaction tests.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/slack/src/exec-approvals.test.ts extensions/slack/src/approval-auth.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/slack/src/monitor/events/interactions.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/commands-approve.test.ts`; `git diff --check`.
Evidence after fix: Tests cover lowercase configured approver ids matching uppercase Slack event users, lowercase sender ids matching uppercase configured allow lists, and rejection of `C...` channel-like ids across raw, prefixed, and mention forms.
Observed result after fix: Targeted Vitest suites and whitespace check passed.
What was not tested: Live Slack workspace approval round trip was not run for this branch.
